attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
STGO.RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_KEY,
STGO.RETURN_ORDER_NUM,
STGO.TRANSMISSION_DT,
STGO.PROCESS_STATUS_CD,
STGO.CREATE_DTM,
STGO.DV_CREATE_DT,
STGO.EXPECTED_ARRIVAL_DT,
STGO.FREIGHT_CARRIER_NAME,
STGO.SK_MESSAGE_ID,
STGO.BTS_PARTNER_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
STGO.ACTION_CODE,
CASE WHEN NRPB.RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_KEY IS NULL THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END AS DML_TYPE
FROM 
(
SELECT 
SM.RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_KEY,
MESSAGE_ID   AS SK_MESSAGE_ID,          
COALESCE(STG.CREATION_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))    AS CREATE_DTM,
CAST(STG.CREATION_DATE AS DATE)  AS DV_CREATE_DT,
CAST(STG.EXPECTED_ARRIVAL_DATE AS DATE) EXPECTED_ARRIVAL_DT,
NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY AS BTS_PARTNER_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
CASE WHEN  PROCESS_STATUS  = 'C' THEN 'COMPLETED' WHEN PROCESS_STATUS = 'E' THEN 'ERROR' WHEN 
PROCESS_STATUS  = 'N' THEN 'NEW' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS PROCESS_STATUS_CD,
COALESCE(STG.R2A_REF_NO,'UNKNOWN')            AS RETURN_ORDER_NUM,
CAST(STG.TRANSMISSION_DATE AS DATE)  AS TRANSMISSION_DT,
COALESCE(STG.CARRIER,'UNKNOWN')              AS FREIGHT_CARRIER_NAME,
ACTION_CODE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_X_MK_3C8R2AHDRS_IFAC STG
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS SM
 ON STG.MESSAGE_ID=SM.SK_MESSAGE_ID
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
 ON STG.ORG_CODE=NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE
  WHERE NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT <> -9999
UNION ALL
SELECT 
SM.RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_KEY,
MESSAGE_ID   AS SK_MESSAGE_ID,          
COALESCE(EX.CREATION_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))    AS CREATE_DTM,
CAST(EX.CREATION_DATE AS DATE)  AS DV_CREATE_DT,
CAST(EX.EXPECTED_ARRIVAL_DATE AS DATE) EXPECTED_ARRIVAL_DT,
NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY AS BTS_PARTNER_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
CASE WHEN  PROCESS_STATUS  = 'C' THEN 'COMPLETED' WHEN PROCESS_STATUS = 'E' THEN 'ERROR' WHEN PROCESS_STATUS  = 'N' THEN 'NEW' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS PROCESS_STATUS_CD,
R2A_REF_NO            AS RETURN_ORDER_NUM,
CAST(EX.TRANSMISSION_DATE AS DATE)  AS TRANSMISSION_DT,
CARRIER              AS FREIGHT_CARRIER_NAME,
ACTION_CODE
 FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_X_MK_3C8R2AHDRS_IFAC EX
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS SM
 ON EX.MESSAGE_ID=SM.SK_MESSAGE_ID
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
 ON EX.ORG_CODE=NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE
 WHERE NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT <> -9999
) STGO

 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS NRPB
 ON STGO.SK_MESSAGE_ID=NRPB.SK_MESSAGE_ID

SELECT  
RANK () OVER (ORDER BY SMP.MESSAGE_ID) + MAX_VAL RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_KEY,
SMP.MESSAGE_ID AS SK_MESSAGE_ID
     FROM  
	(SELECT COALESCE (MAX (RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_KEY), 0) MAX_VAL
	FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS ) SMPO,
	( 
	SELECT   MESSAGE_ID      FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_X_MK_3C8R2AHDRS_IFAC STG
	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
 ON STG.ORG_CODE=NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE
 WHERE NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT <> -9999
 UNION ALL
 	SELECT   MESSAGE_ID      FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_X_MK_3C8R2AHDRS_IFAC EX
	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
  ON EX.ORG_CODE=NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE
  WHERE NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT <> -9999
	) SMP	
WHERE NOT EXISTS 
	(
	SELECT 
	1 
	FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS SMPO
	WHERE SMPO.SK_MESSAGE_ID = SMP.MESSAGE_ID
	    	)

SELECT 
MESSAGE_ID,
REQUEST_ID,
CREATION_DATE,
CREATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
R2A_REF_NO,
TRANSMISSION_DATE,
PARTNER_NAME,
ORG_CODE,
CISCO_DUNS_NUMBER,
PARTNER_DUNS_NUMBER,
RETURN_FROM,
B2B_MFG_STATUS,
CARRIER,
TRACKING_NO,
RETRY_COUNT,
PROCESS_STATUS,
ATTRIBUTE1,
ATTRIBUTE2,
ATTRIBUTE3,
ATTRIBUTE4,
ATTRIBUTE5,
ATTRIBUTE6,
ATTRIBUTE7,
ATTRIBUTE8,
ATTRIBUTE9,
ATTRIBUTE10,
ATTRIBUTE11,
ATTRIBUTE12,
ATTRIBUTE13,
ATTRIBUTE14,
ATTRIBUTE15,
EXPECTED_ARRIVAL_DATE,
GES_UPDATE_DATE,
GLOBAL_NAME,
BATCH_ID,
ACTION_CODE,
CREATE_DATETIME,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE

FROM
(
SELECT
STG.MESSAGE_ID,
STG.REQUEST_ID,
STG.CREATION_DATE,
STG.CREATED_BY,
STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
STG.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
STG.R2A_REF_NO,
STG.TRANSMISSION_DATE,
STG.PARTNER_NAME,
STG.ORG_CODE,
STG.CISCO_DUNS_NUMBER,
STG.PARTNER_DUNS_NUMBER,
STG.RETURN_FROM,
STG.B2B_MFG_STATUS,
STG.CARRIER,
STG.TRACKING_NO,
STG.RETRY_COUNT,
STG.PROCESS_STATUS,
STG.ATTRIBUTE1,
STG.ATTRIBUTE2,
STG.ATTRIBUTE3,
STG.ATTRIBUTE4,
STG.ATTRIBUTE5,
STG.ATTRIBUTE6,
STG.ATTRIBUTE7,
STG.ATTRIBUTE8,
STG.ATTRIBUTE9,
STG.ATTRIBUTE10,
STG.ATTRIBUTE11,
STG.ATTRIBUTE12,
STG.ATTRIBUTE13,
STG.ATTRIBUTE14,
STG.ATTRIBUTE15,
STG.EXPECTED_ARRIVAL_DATE,
STG.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
STG.GLOBAL_NAME,
STG.BATCH_ID,
STG.ACTION_CODE,
STG.CREATE_DATETIME
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_X_MK_3C8R2AHDRS_IFAC STG
)STGO
WHERE NOT EXISTS
( 
SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT  SK_MESSAGE_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS )SP
WHERE STGO.MESSAGE_ID=SP.SK_MESSAGE_ID
)
OR NOT EXISTS
( 
SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT  INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG
WHERE SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT <> -9999 )SP
WHERE STGO.ORG_CODE=SP.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE
)
